name: HDHomeRun Guide Auth Sync
description: Keeps the HDHomeRun XMLTV guide DeviceAuth key in sync with Jellyfin's Live TV listings provider.
overview: Periodically checks your configured HDHomeRun tuners for their current guide DeviceAuth key and updates the XMLTV listings provider URL if it changes.
changelog: 1.2.0.0: Default sync interval changed from 12 to 4 hours. 1.1.0.0: Queue Jellyfin's Refresh Guide task automatically after updating the DeviceAuth key. 1.0.0.0: Initial release: local-discovery based DeviceAuth sync scheduled task.
